title: Simple Progress
description: A powerful Minecraft progress tracking mod that helps you monitor your in-game achievements and goals! Supports kill, obtain, explore, and build progress types with tree chart statistics and HUD display.
body:
# Simple Progress Mod  

## Note: For client use only, and the domain is no longer lanche.vvvv.host  

A feature-rich Minecraft progress tracking and management mod that helps you record every achievement in your game!  

## ✨ Key Features  

### 🎯 Multiple Progress Types  
- **Kill Progress** - Track specific mob kills  
- **Obtain Progress** - Track item collection    
- **Explore Progress** - Track dimension exploration  
- **Build Progress** - Track block placements  

### 📊 Smart Progress Management  
- **Real-time Progress Display** - HUD shows active progress  
- **Tree Chart Statistics** - View completion rates and hierarchical progress  
- **Estimated Time** - Smart estimation of remaining completion time  
- **Auto Save** - Progress data automatically saved, no loss on restart  

### 🌳 Sub-Progress System  
- Create hierarchical progress structures  
- Tree chart displays parent-child relationships  
- Manage complex achievement chains  

## 🚀 Quick Start  

### Installation  
1. Place the mod file in your `mods` folder  
2. Launch the game  

### Basic Usage  
1. Use the `/progress` command in-game to open the Progress Manager  
2. Select progress type (Kill/Obtain/Explore/Build)  
3. Fill in progress title and target ID  
4. Set target quantity  
5. Click "Add Progress" to start tracking  

### Common Commands  
- `/progress` - Open progress manager interface  

## 📖 Detailed Guide  

### Progress Types Explained  
- **Kill Progress** - Use mob IDs like `minecraft:zombie`  
- **Obtain Progress** - Use item IDs like `minecraft:diamond`  
- **Explore Progress** - Use dimension IDs like `minecraft:the_nether`  
- **Build Progress** - Use block IDs like `minecraft:dirt`  

### How to Get IDs  
1. Press `F3 + H` to enable advanced tooltips  
2. Hover over items or entities to see their IDs  
3. Or refer to the complete ID reference table in the help interface  

### Automatic Tracking Rules  
- ✅ Killing mobs automatically updates kill progress  
- ✅ Obtaining items automatically updates obtain progress    
- ✅ Entering dimensions automatically completes explore progress  
- ✅ Placing blocks automatically updates build progress  
- ✅ Progress completion shows chat and HUD notifications  

## ⚙️ Configuration  

### Interface Settings  
Find Simple Progress in the Mods list, click Config button:  
- Switch interface themes  
- Open progress manager directly  
- View detailed usage help  

### Data Management  
- 🔒 Progress data automatically saved to world folder  
- 👤 Each player has independent progress data  
- 💪 Supports cross-session data persistence  

## 📄 License  

This project uses the MIT license. See LICENSE file for details.  

## 👨‍💻 Developer  

- **Developer**: LanChe  
- **Contact**: lanche.vvvv.host  
- **Changelog**: See CHANGELOG.md  

---

**Start tracking your Minecraft achievements today! 🎮**
